description: A designed graphic with a dark brick-wall background. A white instant-photo frame holds a booking-style portrait of an older man with gray hair and a mustache in a yellow-green top, captioned 'METH DEALER' in handwriting-style text. Below is a 'Worst of the Worst' logo with a 'San Antonio' label and an ICE logo.
notable_text: METH DEALER; Worst of the Worst; San Antonio; ICE
